notes: AI creative suite (image/video/3D generation) and the FLUX.1 Krea open model co-developed with Black Forest Labs (2025). Two-syllable name: KREE-uh — first syllable rhymes with "free," second is a schwa. STRESS on first syllable: KREE-uh. Common ESL trap: KRAY-uh; accepted reading is KREE-uh.
